name: Compartir
why_chefs_rate: Casual room by three elBulli head chefs (Castro/Xatruch/Casañas); sister to Barcelona's Disfrutar

name: Rafa's
why_chefs_rate: Ferran Adrià's own favourite; opens only when the catch is good; OAD Casual Europe listed

name: Casa Anita
why_chefs_rate: No-menu plancha grill since the 1960s; a Dalí haunt; sole, turbot, sardines off the grill

name: Restaurant La Gamba
why_chefs_rate: Palamós red-prawn benchmark since 1967 (Quadrat family); numbered prawn portions by the port
